ab: kusa su kenu mosa tatak su?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: piray cu toruy mosa tatak mu.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: kusa nya kenu mosa beh halan pkhguk?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: mkhani mosa beh halan pkhguk ku heya.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: kusa su kenu mosa beh Ponghuw?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: pgluw caku glgan mlaka mosa beh Ponghuw.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: kusa su kenu mosa beh Ponghuw?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: pgluw caku xune mosa beh Ponghuw.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: pgluw su lalu mosa sali?
en: How do you go home?

ab: pgluw caku cyeyun mosa sali.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: Uma pgluw su lalu mosa beh pwasan biru?
en: How does Uma go to school?

ab: wa mluw kisya wayan beh pwasan biru ku Uma la.
en: Uma goes to school by train.

ab: pgluw lalu mosa kyokay ku Piling?
en: How does Piling go to church?

ab: pgluw zitensya mosa kyokay ku Piling.
en: Piling goes to church by bicycle.

ab: mluw su cyeyun mosa m’was biru?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: iyat, mluw cu basu mosa m’was biru.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: mluw su zitensya mosa m’was biru?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: ang, mluw cu zitensya mosa m’was biru.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: pgluw su kisya spito mosa beh Takaw?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: ang, pgluw cu kisya spito mosa Takaw.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: mosa su beh Tayto ga pgluw su kisya ga pgluw su glgan mlaka?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: pgluw cu glgan mlaka, glgan mlaka ru kisya ga helaw tehok glgan mlaka iya.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: mosa su kyokay ga pgluw su basu ga piray su toruy?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: piray cu toruy mosa beh kyakay, miray toruy ru mluw basu ga myasa miray toruy iya.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: sali su ru bbisan llamu ga sobeh?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: ini sobeh, mluw cu otobay kryax mosa beh bbisan llamu haca.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: yubing kyoku ru pwasan biru ga sobeh?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: sobeh ci, mkhani lga tehok la.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: nni’an ru eki ga sobeh?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: mhtu eki lga mkhani cikah magan miray ruyux rong tmuting lga tehok la.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
